query: SELECT pu.id, pu.phone, pu.name, pu.role, d.id as driverId, d.name as driverName, d.phone as driverPhone FROM phoneUsers pu LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.userId = pu.id OR d.phone = pu.phone WHERE pu.phone = '0557999999' OR d.name LIKE '%سعد%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KsiW6Qbmpv9cc9.a9e99b377716 --database NK9L9naBDDKkTQDnwgY78j --execute SELECT pu.id, pu.phone, pu.name, pu.role, d.id as driverId, d.name as driverName, d.phone as driverPhone FROM phoneUsers pu LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.userId = pu.id OR d.phone = pu.phone WHERE pu.phone = '0557999999' OR d.name LIKE '%سعد%' LIMIT 5;
